beats.activity: Wake up, water the rooftop herb garden, make coffee.
beats.reasoning: Sunday morning ritual—Sebastian starts every day tending his basil and tomatoes on the roof, especially after a low-energy Saturday. The calm, sunny forecast makes this a perfect morning to linger with his plants and coffee.

beats.activity: Leisurely breakfast and vinyl browsing at home.
beats.reasoning: No work today; Sebastian can slow down and enjoy his collection—a core comfort activity for this introvert, especially after a moderately depleted energy state yesterday.

beats.activity: Walk to Green Lake for a trail run.
beats.reasoning: Sunny, 72°F Sunday is ideal for trail running—one of Sebastian's favorite outlets. Green Lake is a 20-minute walk from South Lake Union, close enough to preserve his introverted energy.
The perfect weather and quiet Sunday morning draw Sebastian out for a sustained run. This recharges him after yesterday's low energy; solitude in nature is his reset button.
Unhurried return after the run, decompressing as he walks through the neighborhood in morning light.

beats.activity: Shower, tidy up, light meal prep.
beats.reasoning: Post-run recovery and lunch prep at home—Sebastian stays grounded and avoids crowds on a busy Sunday.

beats.activity: Lunch with fresh herbs from the garden.
beats.reasoning: A quiet lunch at home using his own basil and tomatoes—consistent with his pattern of simple, intentional meals and minimal social overhead.

beats.activity: Tend the rooftop garden, deadhead spent blooms, organize gardening notes.
beats.reasoning: Sunday afternoon is prime time for garden maintenance. The sunny weather and calm energy make this a meditative, grounding activity—exactly what an introvert needs mid-day.

beats.activity: Walk to a nearby record shop for browsing.
beats.reasoning: A solo, low-pressure record shop visit in Capitol Hill (15 min walk/drive) fits Sebastian's pattern of curated leisure time. He's selective about crowds and prefers quieter Sunday afternoons to weekends.
Easy return from Capitol Hill, still early enough in the afternoon to settle in for the evening.

beats.activity: Listen to vinyl, read, and prepare a simple dinner.
beats.reasoning: Late afternoon wind-down: Sebastian plays records, reads, and cooks—his favorite rhythm for Sunday evening. No social obligations, just home contentment.

beats.activity: Dinner at home with fresh herbs and a glass of wine.
beats.reasoning: Quiet, intentional dinner—consistent with his pattern of cooking with his own garden produce and savoring the evening at home.

beats.activity: Evening leisure: reading, vinyl, reflecting on the week.
beats.reasoning: Sunday night wind-down before the work week—Sebastian uses this quiet time to recharge and center himself. No rushing, no crowds; just home contentment.
A full 7+ hours of sleep to prepare for the Monday shift at Interbay—Sebastian prioritizes rest, especially after a depleted Saturday.

world_event_prompt: Calm, sunny Sunday, high of 72F. Quiet end-of-week day with no major disruptions. Lake Union sees heavy recreational boat and paddle traffic in the afternoon.
